data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies user choices to decrease decision time and improve navigation efficiency.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focuses on the 20% of features that deliver 80% of value to users.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs key action buttons larger and closer to natural click areas.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Leverages users' familiarity with other major technology websites to ensure ease of use.

data.title: Doherty Threshold
data.description: Ensures response times are fast enough to keep users engaged.
